titleStmt.title: SII 25.252: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 252. (A.R. No. 252 of 1908.) GĀDIA, BASTAR STATE, CENTRAL PROVINCES.

summary.p: On a slab found in the ruins between the Dīwān and Śītālā tanks in this town.
This Sanskrit record in Nāgarī characters is dated Śaka 1242, Raudra, Jyēshṭha ba 5 corresponding to 1320 A.D., May 27.
It furnishes the genealogy of the Kākaira chiefs commencing from Siṁharāj upto Bhānudēva. The genealogical order is as follows: Siṁharāj Vyāghra Vōpadēva Kṛishṇa Jaitarāja Sōmachandra Bhānudēva

It also gives the genealogy of the minister of king Bhānudēva for four generations. While tracing the eulogy of the nāyaka Vāsudēva, the minister of king Bhānudēva, it records the construction of the two temples of Mahādēva and another in honour of the local deity of the fields besides a building with a gateway (pratōli) and the excavation of two tanks.
The expression kauḍika-bandha is interesting. Probably it refers to the damming up of a tank (taḍāga). The place Kākaira is mentioned as the capital of king Bhānudēva.
The genealogy of the minister Vāsudēva is given below: Dāmōdara Pōlū-nāyaka Bhīma Vāsudēva (resident of the town Kākaira)
The record was written by Śaktikumāra.
(Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. IX, Text pp. 126-27).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Oṁ sidviḥ . Āśīdvaṁśe himāṁsormmahitaguṇagaṇa ssiṁha rādverisiṁhasta smādyāghrāvanīśo bhava
datula yaśāhā tejasāpāstaśūryaḥ . jase sopi sva vīryocita nṛpatilakaṁ bopadevaṁ sa caivaṁ kṛṣṇā
khyaṁ vairirājavrajadalanaparaṁ vikramākrāṁta viśvaṁ . 1 . kākaire vanipapāla maulimukuṭaprodbhā
sihīrāṁkura jyoti dyotitapādapaṁkaja nakajyoti mrakāśā bhuvi . saṁgrāmāṁgaṇa vīravikra
maguṇaḥ śrījaitarājo bhavattasmādadbhuta satpratāpamahasaḥ śrīsomacaṁdronṛpaḥ . 2 . tasmātśrī
guṇa sāgarādabhinavassavaṁgiveṣojvalaḥ śrībhānurdharaṇīdharaḥ kṣititale labdhapratiṣṭhodayaḥ
jāgertti pratipakṣapakṣadalano bhūpāla cūḍārmāṇaḥ yasminśāśati loka Eṣa sukṛtī jāgartti śa
dvāsanaḥ . 3 . deśaḥ puṇyanirīti Iḍāsvata dhanassatkarmmaniṣṭhā dvijāḥ sveṣṭhāpūrtta parāḥ prajāṣki
maparaṁ paurāḥ paraṁ dhārmmikāḥ . samyāḥ śāstravicāra dhautamanaso dhammavitāra kalau rājyaṁ śāsa
ti bhānudevanṛpatau kiṁ kiṁ na lokottaraṁ . 4 . vaṁśe nāgada lopajīvana janasphīte bhavannā
yakaḥ śrīdāmodara sūnurujvalayaśā polūprajā nāyakaḥ . khyātastattanayaḥ svabhāvasara
lo bhīmābhidhastasuto kākaire nṛpabhānudeva nagare śrīvāsudevobhavat . 5 . staṁbhoyaṁ na
garasya jātijanatānahyaprabhānāyako vikhyātaṣkila bhānudevanṛpateḥ pādāṁbujārādhakaḥ .
saṁgrāmāṁgaṇasādivargapurataḥ khyātaprabhāvo mahānjāgartyadbhutavikramo dhutidharaḥ śrīvā
sudavo bhuvi . 6 . devaśrīśasibhūṣaṇasya kṛtinā devālayaṁ kāritaṁ yugmaṁ maṁḍapaśobhitaṁ ca
puratobhadraṁ pratolyā saha . kṣetresasya tathā surālayavaraṁ sphītaṁ ta ḍāgaṁ tathā baṁdhaṁ kauḍikasaṁjñakaṁ
bahajalaṁ dīrghaṁ tathā svānitaṁ . 7 . haṣṛāpūrttaparasyāśītsatkīrttiśasicaṁdrikā . vāsude
vasya visphārā sthitācandrārkatārakaṁ . 8 . saṁvat 1242 raudra saṁvatsare jyeṣṭa vadi
paṁcamyāṁ . prasastissamāropitā nāyakavāsudevena likhitā saktikumāreṇa . śivaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 25.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
